name: Scenario Gate
func:

return msg;

name: latency_to_payload
func:
msg.payload = (msg.meta && msg.meta.latency_ms != null) ? msg.meta.latency_ms : "";
return msg;

command: bash -lc 'read cpu u1 n1 s1 i1 w1 irq1 sirq1 st1 g1 gn1 < /proc/stat; t1=$((u1+n1+s1+i1+w1+irq1+sirq1+st1)); id1=$((i1+w1)); sleep 0.2; read cpu u2 n2 s2 i2 w2 irq2 sirq2 st2 g2 gn2 < /proc/stat; t2=$((u2+n2+s2+i2+w2+irq2+sirq2+st2)); id2=$((i2+w2)); dt=$((t2-t1)); did=$((id2-id1)); cpu=$(awk -v dt=$dt -v did=$did "BEGIN{ if(dt<=0) print \"0.0\"; else printf \"%.1f\", (100*(dt-did)/dt)}"); mem=$(free -m | awk "/^Mem:/{print \$3}"); echo "$cpu,$mem"'
name: exec (CPU/mem)
Set payload to e2e csv
func:
msg.payload = msg.e2e_csv_line || "";
return msg;
